narrative:
Fairland Local Sd (Lawrence) school district has 256 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -25.1% D−R vs -38.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
